stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":3,"creativity-free-response":"It's no creative in my opinion. I played that kind of games before and they were made a lot better, but i get it it's just AI generated game. Maybe if you add something extra to gameplay it will be better.","originality-rating":3,"originality-free-response":"No suprise at all, I met game like this before. Graphics is bad and not much mechanics.","effectiveness-rating":2,"effectiveness-free-response":"It was kinda frustrating to get to last chapter and finish the game. That's AI generated game so I guess not much effort and you can see it clearly."}
